data.current_description: Creates new app user with display name.

data.current_description: Permanently removes an app user from the system.
data.summary_suggestion: Permanently delete an app user
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes an app user from a project, preventing further authentication and data collection by that user. Requires the project ID and app user ID.
